## Review checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior or the PR explains why no test applies.
- [ ] Generated worldpack files and locks are refreshed when source content changes.
- [ ] Register review completed for changes under `v2/content/**` against `v2/docs/writing-style.md` (or not applicable).
